title: Align Trading Terminal screen to mockup pixel-perfectly
description: Match Trading Terminal to mockup exactly.
design:
## Goal
Align lib/ui/screens/trading_terminal_screen.dart and lib/ui/widgets/trading_terminal/* to the Trading Terminal mockup in mockups/YouTrade.dc.html with pixel-perfect styling, deterministic mock data, and full test coverage.

## Effort Estimate
6-8 hours

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Symbol chips show BTC, ETH, SOL, AAPL, GOLD with exact active/inactive colors, borders, radii, and typography.
- [ ] Price header matches mockup: Space Grotesk 19px symbol, class tag, name/venue, JetBrains Mono 24px last price in up/down color, 24h change.
- [ ] 24h stat strip renders High/Low/Vol/Funding with exact grid styling; Funding hidden for SPOT/EQUITY classes.
- [ ] Chart toolbar has timeframe chips (1m,5m,15m,1h,4h,1d,1w) and a compare button that navigates to /markets/compare.
- [ ] Candlestick chart is custom-painted to match mockup: 248px height, grid, MA7 (#00e6d2 90%), MA25 (#ffb020), volume bars at 32% opacity, bull/bear colors, dashed last-price line + label, dashed crosshair + label, right price axis.
- [ ] Lower tabs Trade/Book/Info/Signals match exact active/inactive styling.
- [ ] Trade tab: Buy/Long & Sell/Short toggle, Limit/Market/Stop order-type chips, price row, leverage slider hidden for non-perp/future symbols, 25/50/75/100 size-percent buttons, size/cost estimate, submit CTA that shows a demo confirmation dialog.
- [ ] Book tab: asks (red) and bids (green) with cumulative depth bars, mid price strip, spread text.
- [ ] Info tab: tag cards, 8-item stats grid, About paragraph using DeterministicMarketDataStore metadata.
- [ ] Signals tab: gauge with 85% opacity arcs and needle, BUY/NEUTRAL/SELL verdict, oscillator list, moving-average list, pivot levels grid — all values computed deterministically from candles/ticker.
- [ ] DeterministicMarketDataStore is wired as the repository mock fallback so runtime data matches the mockup exactly.
- [ ] All existing widget tests pass; new tests verify exact deterministic values, tab switching, compare navigation, and demo-trade dialog.
- [ ] Existing integration test updated to assert terminal exact values and compare navigation.
- [ ] flutter analyze, flutter test, and dart format --set-exit-if-changed all pass.

## Implementation Checklist
- [ ] 1. Wire DeterministicMarketDataStore: replace MockMarketDataStore default in MarketDataRepositoryImpl and update repository tests if needed.
- [ ] 2. Add TradingSymbol metadata helper (symbol_class.dart) mapping raw symbols to name, class, base, decimals, venue per mockup symMeta().
- [ ] 3. Update formatting.dart: add formatAxisNumber, formatSynthetics, ensure grouping matches mockup.
- [ ] 4. Update symbol_chip_row.dart: swap chips to BTC/ETH/SOL/AAPL/GOLD, apply exact active/inactive styles.
- [ ] 5. Update symbol_header.dart: exact price header layout/stat strip; hide funding for non-perp/future.
- [ ] 6. Update time_frame_selector.dart: exact chip styles; compare button navigates to /markets/compare via context.go.
- [ ] 7. Replace candlestick_chart.dart with custom CustomPaint implementation matching mockup drawing logic.
- [ ] 8. Update lower_tabs.dart: exact active bar and text colors.
- [ ] 9. Update trade_ticket.dart: exact side/order/size/leverage/submit styling; demo confirmation AlertDialog; hide leverage for spot/equity.
- [ ] 10. Update order_book_panel.dart: exact book row styling, depth bars, mid/spread strip.
- [ ] 11. Update fundamentals_card.dart: exact tags/stats/about per mockup fundamentals().
- [ ] 12. Update signal_gauge.dart: exact gauge, oscillators, MAs, pivots per mockup screenVals TA section.
- [ ] 13. Update trading_terminal_screen.dart: remove AppBar title per mockup full-screen style (keep Scaffold body); ensure safe area padding.
- [ ] 14. Update widget tests: deterministic repository override, exact value assertions, tab switching, compare navigation, submit dialog.
- [ ] 15. Update integration test helpers and app_test with deterministic repo and terminal assertions.
- [ ] 16. Run flutter analyze, flutter test, dart format --set-exit-if-changed.

## Key Considerations

**Deterministic Data Dependency**:
- DeterministicMarketDataStore uses the same Park-Miller PRNG and series() algorithm as the HTML mockup. Wiring it as the repository fallback guarantees runtime values match the mockup screenshots.
- Repository tests that assert MockMarketDataStore-specific values must be updated to DeterministicMarketDataStore expectations.

**Symbol Classes**:
- BTCUSDT/ETHUSDT/SOLUSDT are crypto; AAPL is equity; GC=F is future. Funding applies only to PERP/FUTURE classes per mockup (hide for SPOT/EQUITY).
- Leverage slider is shown only for PERP/FUTURE classes.

**Candlestick Chart Custom Painter**:
- The `candlesticks` package cannot reproduce the mockup's exact grid, dashed last-price line, crosshair, and right price axis. Implement a CustomPaint widget replicating the HTML drawCandles() logic.
- Use `withValues(alpha: ...)` for translucent colors; avoid deprecated `withOpacity`.

**Compare Navigation**:
- Compare is a public route (/markets/compare). Use `GoRouter.of(context).go('/markets/compare')` or `context.go`.
- Existing public routes set: {'/markets', '/markets/compare'} in app_router.dart — no new route needed.

**Demo Confirmation**:
- Submit CTA shows an AlertDialog with side, symbol, price, size, and cost; no real order execution.

**Edge Cases**:
- Empty candles/ticker: show placeholders/zeros without crashing.
- Invalid symbol parameter: retain existing fallback to selectedSymbolProvider.
- Theme brightness: use colorScheme and AppColorTheme; all colors resolve at runtime for dark/light and flux/carbon.

## Anti-patterns
- ❌ No hardcoded colors outside theme tokens / design_tokens.md.
- ❌ No new dependencies (use existing packages only: flutter, riverpod, go_router, fl_chart if needed, candlesticks replaced by CustomPaint).
- ❌ No breaking existing navigation or auth behavior.
- ❌ No skipping tests; write failing tests before production code (TDD).
- ❌ No real trading logic in submit handler.
- ❌ No hardcoded API keys.

title: Build Portfolio/Home screen from mockups
design:
## Goal
Build the Portfolio/Home screen from the YouTrade.dc.html mockup as a standalone Scaffold, matching the dark-first design system and using existing Riverpod theme providers. The screen displays aggregated net worth, an equity curve, allocation by venue, exchange cards, and open positions.

## Effort Estimate
6-8 hours

## Success Criteria
- [ ] `lib/ui/screens/portfolio_screen.dart` exists and renders without overflow on a 390x844 iPhone-sized viewport.
- [ ] Screen matches mockup sections: iOS-style status bar, app header with theme/direction toggles, total equity, 24h delta, equity curve, allocation bar, exchange cards, and open positions list.
- [ ] Reusable widgets live only under `lib/ui/widgets/portfolio/` (`exchange_card.dart`, `position_tile.dart`, `equity_curve.dart`, `allocation_bar.dart`).
- [ ] Uses `flutter_riverpod` and existing theme extensions (`AppColorTheme`, `appThemeProvider`, `themeSettingsProvider`).
- [ ] `test/ui/screens/portfolio_screen_test.dart` passes and verifies: total equity shown, allocation bar present, at least one exchange card rendered, at least one position tile rendered, no overflow exceptions.
- [ ] `flutter test`, `flutter analyze`, and `dart format --set-exit-if-changed lib test` all pass.

## Implementation Checklist
- [ ] Read `mockups/YouTrade.dc.html` to extract layout, colors, typography, and spacing for the Home/Portfolio screen.
- [ ] Create reusable widgets:
  - `lib/ui/widgets/portfolio/allocation_bar.dart` — segmented horizontal bar with exchange colors and share percentages.
  - `lib/ui/widgets/portfolio/exchange_card.dart` — venue avatar, name, kinds, live dot, value, and percentage.
  - `lib/ui/widgets/portfolio/position_tile.dart` — symbol avatar, symbol/side badge, venue/qty, value, PnL.
  - `lib/ui/widgets/portfolio/equity_curve.dart` — mock equity line chart using `fl_chart` with 1D/1W/1M/1Y/ALL range chips.
- [ ] Implement `lib/ui/screens/portfolio_screen.dart`:
  - `ConsumerWidget` or `ConsumerStatefulWidget` observing `themeSettingsProvider`.
  - Static mock portfolio data (no real network calls or exchange secrets).
  - Header toggles call `ref.read(themeSettingsProvider.notifier).toggleLightDark()` and `toggleVisualDirection()`.
  - Scrollable body with all mockup sections.
  - Placeholder bottom tab bar row (Phase 5 integrates real navigation).
- [ ] Write `test/ui/screens/portfolio_screen_test.dart` using `ProviderScope` and `MaterialApp` with `appThemeProvider`.
- [ ] Run verification commands and fix analyzer/formatting issues.
- [ ] Commit with the specified message.

## Key Considerations

**Edge Case: Empty or missing providers**
- If a required provider is missing, use static mock data widgets instead of introducing new production dependencies.
- Do not create TODO stubs for domain entities or repository contracts.

**Edge Case: Theme/direction changes**
- Toggles must update `themeSettingsProvider` state; the widget must rebuild via `ConsumerWidget`/`ref.watch`.
- Test should run with default dark Flux theme to avoid golden failures.

**Edge Case: Layout overflow**
- Wrap screen body in `SingleChildScrollView`.
- Avoid unbounded vertical growth in lists by using `Column` inside scroll view (all mock items fixed).
- Test on 390x844 logical viewport to catch overflow.

**Edge Case: Accessibility**
- Use `IconButton`/`TextButton` semantics for toggles and tappable cards.
- Provide `Tooltip` for icon-only header actions.

## Anti-patterns
- ❌ No exchange API secrets or private keys stored in the Flutter app.
- ❌ No direct exchange-specific logic in UI or use cases (architecture: must go through repository/interfaces).
- ❌ No giant exchange interface that forces every venue to implement unsupported methods (SOLID: interface segregation).
- ❌ No TODO stubs for core domain entities or repository contract.
- ❌ No polling for real-time data; use WebSocket streams for active symbols (static mock data allowed here).
- ❌ No ad-hoc state mutation outside notifiers.
- ❌ No deviation from the mockup design system without explicit user approval.
- ❌ Do not modify `lib/main.dart` or global routing.
- ❌ Do not create bottom navigation here (Phase 5 handles integration).
